MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Terry Finch, Esq. and Ctnthia Soliman, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot, 415-362-7126 for defendant and moving party Virgil Dizon
Joseph Appel, Esq., 925-938-2000 for plaintiff and opposing party Simone Renee Adams
William Armstrong, Esq. of Armstrong, Callan & Shiu, LLP for plaintiff and intervenor ZL Specialty

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court ruled as follows --
DEFENDANT VIRGIL DIZON'S Notice Of Motion To Amend Or Modify Judgment, Adjudicate Lien Or In The Alternative To Vacate Judgment Under Ccp 473(B) IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT IS VACATED ON THE GROUNDS THAT NO NOTICE WAS GIVEN, THAT IT WAS WAS BEING REQUESTED, NO OPPORTUNITY TO OBJECT TO THE FORM OF JUDGMENT AT THE TIME IT WAS BEING REQUESTED. MR. FINCH to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
